methods.description: Process for collecting and preparing sediment cores for analysis, including splitting, photographing, and subsampling.

steps.description: In 2014, two new cores, ZK01 and ZK02, were collected from the Qidong and Haimen areas by rotary drilling.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment cores using rotary drilling

steps.description: In the laboratory, these cores were split, photographed, described, and subsampled.
steps.searchable_summary: process cores by splitting, photographing, and subsampling

methods.description: Analysis of grain size for sediment samples using standard methods and GRADISTAT software.

steps.description: The grain size of 134 samples was analyzed at 0.25Φ intervals using standard methods.
Grain-size parameters determined using the GRADISTAT software.

methods.description: Identification of gastropod fossils and determination of foraminifer content in sediment samples.

steps.description: Ten samples were obtained for gastropod-fossil identification using the method described by Yu et al. (1963).
steps.searchable_summary: identify gastropod fossils using Yu et al. method

steps.description: Forty-three samples were collected for determination of the foraminifer content using the method described by Zhang et al. (2014) and Wang et al. (1988).
steps.searchable_summary: determine foraminifer content using Zhang and Wang methods

methods.description: Determination and calibration of AMS 14C ages for various samples using Beta Analytic Radiocarbon Dating Laboratory and Calib Rev 7.1 program.

steps.description: The 14C ages were determined on shells, organic-rich sediments, and plant material by the Beta Analytic Radiocarbon Dating Laboratory.
steps.searchable_summary: determine 14C ages using Beta Analytic Radiocarbon Dating

steps.description: AMS 14C ages were calibrated using the Calib Rev 7.1 (beta) program.
The 14C ages of four shell samples were calibrated utilizing the Marine13 model with a ΔR value of 135 ± 42.
steps.searchable_summary: calibrate shell 14C ages using Marine13 model

methods.description: Characterization of mud layers within sediment cores, identifying organized and disorganized types based on thickness and bioturbation.

steps.description: Mud layers are characterized by thickness, stratification, and bioturbation index.
steps.searchable_summary: characterize mud layers by thickness and bioturbation

steps.description: Identify organized mud layers (OM) with tidal rhythmicity and disorganized mud layers (DM) without rhythmicity.
steps.searchable_summary: identify organized and disorganized mud layers
